observations.summary: Dan's father may have never truly existed or was misperceived by Dan due to his youth.

evidence.quote: Or perhaps he'd never really existed.

observations.notes: This observation reflects a strong thematic motif of uncertain paternal presence and the unreliability of memory.

observations.summary: Dan's youth caused him to mistake temporary calm for genuine wisdom in his perception of his father.

evidence.quote: Perhaps Dan had simply been too young to see his father clearly, had mistaken temporary calm for genuine wisdom.

observations.notes: Highlights the theme of youthful misunderstanding and the complexity of parental figures.

accepted_observations.notes: This observation reflects a strong thematic motif of uncertain paternal presence and the unreliability of memory.
